Uses of Class
liquibase.command.CommandArgumentDefinition

  • Packages that use CommandArgumentDefinition 
    Package Description
    liquibase.command  
    liquibase.command.core  
    liquibase.extension.testing.testsystem.command  
    liquibase.integration.commandline  
    liquibase.sdk.convert  

    • Uses of CommandArgumentDefinition in liquibase.command

      Methods in liquibase.command that return CommandArgumentDefinition 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      CommandArgumentDefinition<DataType> CommandArgumentDefinition.Building.build()
      Complete construction and register the definition with the rest of the system.
      CommandArgumentDefinition<?> CommandDefinition.getArgument(String argName)
      Returns the given argument definition for this command.
      Methods in liquibase.command that return types with arguments of type CommandArgumentDefinition 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      SortedMap<String,CommandArgumentDefinition<?>> CommandDefinition.getArguments()
      Returns the arguments for this command.
      <T> SortedSet<CommandArgumentDefinition<T>> CommandDefinition.getArguments(Class<T> argumentType)
      Convenience method to return the arguments for this command which are of a given type.
      Methods in liquibase.command with parameters of type CommandArgumentDefinition 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void CommandDefinition.add(CommandArgumentDefinition commandArg) 
      <T> CommandScope CommandScope.addArgumentValue(CommandArgumentDefinition<T> argument, T value)
      Adds the given key/value pair to the stored argument data.
      int CommandArgumentDefinition.compareTo(CommandArgumentDefinition<?> o) 
      <T> T CommandScope.getArgumentValue(CommandArgumentDefinition<T> argument)
      Convenience method for CommandScope.getConfiguredValue(CommandArgumentDefinition), returning ConfiguredValue.getValue() along with any getValueConverter() applied
      <T> ConfiguredValue<T> CommandScope.getConfiguredValue(CommandArgumentDefinition<T> argument)
      Returns the detailed information about how an argument is set.
      protected void CommandFactory.register(String[] commandName, CommandArgumentDefinition<?> definition)
      Called by CommandArgumentDefinition.Building.build() to register that a particular CommandArgumentDefinition is available for a command.
